---
title: "besgsdag_5"
subtitle: "`besgsdag_5`"
description: "besgsdag_5"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/besgsdag_5/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                            | Title                         | Type   | Description                                                                                                           |
|---------------------------------|-------------------------------|--------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                         | The unique name of the event  | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                    |
| `center`                        | Research center               | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                 |
| `date_v5`                       | date_v5                       | date   | Date of visit. Visit 5.                                                                                               |
| `staff_initials_v5`             | staff_initials_v5             | string | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the visit. Visit 5.                                     |
| `identified_name_cpr_v5`        | identified_name_cpr_v5        | string | Indicates whether the participant has been identified by full name and personal identification number (CPR). Visit 5. |
| `relative_v5`                   | relative_v5                   | string | Indicates whether a relative or accompanying person is present at the visit. Visit 5.                                 |
| `relative_name_v5`              | relative_name_v5              | string | The name of the relative attending the visit. Visit 5.                                                                |
| `sens_download_phone_v5`        | sens_download_phone_v5        | string | Whether the participant has downloaded the SENS app to their phone. Visit 5.                                          |
| `sens_id_nr_v5`                 | sens_id_nr_v5                 | string | Identification of the SENS tracker. Visit 5.                                                                          |
| `sens_turned_on_v5`             | sens_turned_on_v5             | string | Indicates if tracker is turned on and time period for measuring registred in webapp. Visit 5.                         |
| `sens_applied_v5`               | sens_applied_v5               | string | Whether SENS device has been applied. Visit 5.                                                                        |
| `sens_notapplied_reason_v5`     | sens_notapplied_reason_v5     | string | Reason why the SENS accelerometer was not applied. Recorded by study staff. Visit 5.                                  |
| `sens_application_date_v5`      | sens_application_date_v5      | date   | Date of SENS application. Visit 5.                                                                                    |
| `sens_info_v5`                  | sens_info_v5                  | string | Whether the participant has received information about SENS. Visit 5.                                                 |
| `sens_patches_and_zip_given_v5` | sens_patches_and_zip_given_v5 | string | Indicates if participant has received zip bag with extra patches. Visit 5.                                            |
| `stool_kit_v5`                  | stool_kit_v5                  | string | Stool sample home collection kit handed out to participant. Visit 5.                                                  |

: Fields in the `besgsdag_5` resource.
